meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no project ideas' trap by building high-impact user onboarding flows. Master Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your first portfolio project.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for the 'perfect' app idea. Instead, master the art of user onboarding. By building a frictionless sign-up and feature-discovery flow for a mock SaaS, you gain the exact technical skills employers demand while solving the problem of stagnant project portfolios with a high-value, functional micro-tool.
content.intro:
The blank editor is a graveyard of ambition. You sit there, fingers poised over the keys, paralyzed by the 'no project ideas' syndrome that claims more student developers than any technical hurdle. You don't need a revolutionary startup concept; you need a focused, high-impact component that proves you can guide a user from 'stranger' to 'power user'.

User onboarding is the heartbeat of every successful SaaS. By specializing in this, you bridge the gap between amateur code and professional product engineering. Let’s stop chasing ideas and start building the foundational architecture that turns a raw application into a polished, market-ready experience.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the three critical steps: Welcome, Value Proposition, and Action Trigger. This provides the blueprint for your logic flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a 3-step user onboarding flow including fields for user progress, feature tour completion status, and personalization preferences.

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Develop a lightweight, modular interface that renders the onboarding steps. Focus on clean state management to ensure users don't lose progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React functional component for an onboarding modal that handles state transitions between 'Welcome', 'Feature Discovery', and 'App Launch'.

steps.title: Implement Progress Persistence
steps.description: Ensure that if a user refreshes the page, their onboarding progress is saved. This teaches you about local storage and state hydration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom hook to persist the current onboarding step to localStorage and retrieve it on component mount.

steps.title: Add Interactive Tooltips
steps.description: Use CSS positioning and event listeners to highlight specific features. This is a core skill for UX-focused developers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a tooltip component that calculates its position relative to a target DOM element and animates on entry.

steps.title: Validate and Refine Flow
steps.description: Run your flow through a series of edge-case tests to ensure a seamless user experience, even if they exit early.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the onboarding code for potential UX bottlenecks and suggest improvements for mobile responsiveness.

pro_tips: Always measure the 'Time to First Value' (TTFV) in your onboarding; if it exceeds 60 seconds, your flow is too long.
Use mock data to simulate user behavior rather than building a full backend database for your first iteration.
Prioritize accessibility (a11y) early; screen readers should be able to navigate your onboarding modals seamlessly.
Implement an 'Exit/Skip' button on every step to respect user autonomy—forced onboarding is a major conversion killer.
Add a small confetti or success animation upon completion to trigger a dopamine hit and reinforce positive user behavior.
resources: UX Planet Onboarding Best Practices: https://uxplanet.org
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, integrate it into a larger project like a Task Manager or a Weather Dashboard to demonstrate real-world application utility.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'right' idea to strike. Build the tools that define user success and watch your portfolio transform from a list of tutorials into a showcase of professional-grade product work. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
